verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In my life You've heard me say I love you How do I show you it's true Hear my heart, it longs for more of you. I've fallen deeply in love with you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You have to conquer my heart I'm captivated by you Never will you and I part I've fallen deeply in love with you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You and I, together forever Nothing can, stand in the way My love for you, grows stronger Each new day. I've fallen deeply in love with you
